things.name: Guadalcanal WWII Battlefields
things.description: Sites of the 1942-43 battle that turned the tide of WWII including Iron Bottom Sound

things.name: Solomon Islands National Museum
things.description: Traditional shell money, carvings, war artefacts and natural history

things.name: Central Market (Cenotaph Market)
things.description: Colourful market with tropical fruits, betel nut, grass skirts and Solomon carvings

things.name: Bonegi Beach WWII Wrecks
things.description: Two Japanese ships wrecked in 1942 - one partially above water, one for diving

things.name: Henderson Field (Honiara Airport)
things.description: The airfield fought over so desperately in the WWII Guadalcanal Campaign

things.name: Tenaru River & Waterfall
things.description: Site of the Battle of the Tenaru and a beautiful river waterfall for swimming

things.name: Florida Islands Snorkelling
things.description: Pristine coral reefs accessible by boat with sea turtles and reef sharks

things.name: Skull Island (Malaita Province)
things.description: Island where ancestral skull shrines are maintained by custom priests

things.name: Kakabona Village Cultural Experience
things.description: Traditional village ceremony with custom dancing and local craft demonstrations

things.name: Tulagi Day Trip
things.description: Former colonial capital with WWII relics, dive sites and traditional villages
